title: PARENT CHILD DEVELOPMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: IMPACT NW BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER PARENT CHILD DEVELOPMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Parenting education program based in the family's home. Parent educators follow the Parents as Teachers (PAT) curriculum to provide parenting materials, school readiness activities, and developmental and health screenings. Parent educators also facilitate interactive playgroups and connect families to supportive resources. 7211 SE 62nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-5 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Closed Friday, December 22, 2023-Monday, January 1, 2024 Email (503) 294-7387 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (503) 294-7387 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Ukrainian, Russian, Arabic, Chinese AREA SERVED: City of Portland (Multnomah County only) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Home Based Parenting Education Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN YOUTH ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD THERAPEUTIC SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE AND TOGETHER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
